Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Excellent shooting! Order the gunner to cease fire by selecting the USS Gallery from the Tactical Display (or Formation Manager), and hit the X key to order him to cease fire.
You can also order units to ceasefire by right clicking on them and hitting the Cease Fire menu option.
Cease Fire commands work for all weapon types, not just guns, and affect all queued attack orders for that unit.
